notes: Full skill procedure executed. Validator (validate_owm.mjs) and layout check (check_layout.mjs) were blocked by sandbox permissions on the node invocation; the three structural checks (coord range, endpoint-existence, visibility hard-rule) plus near-duplicate and stage-boundary layout checks were walked by hand against the full draft, with 10 visibility violations fixed during a restructure and five stage-boundary nudges applied. Map has 34 components + 1 anchor, 88 edges, 5 evolve arrows, 2 notes. Deep placement notes cover CBDC, Cryptocurrency, Mobile Money Wallet, Mesh Networks, and Digital Identity.
